verses.text: God declares He will 'utterly consume all things from off the land,' man and beast and the stumblingblocks of the wicked. Sweeping judgment. Persistent sin invites a thorough reckoning.
God declares He will 'utterly consume all things from off the land,' man and beast and the stumblingblocks of the wicked. Sweeping judgment. Persistent sin invites a thorough reckoning.
God declares He will 'utterly consume all things from off the land,' man and beast and the stumblingblocks of the wicked. Sweeping judgment. Persistent sin invites a thorough reckoning.
He will cut off the remnant of Baal, the worshippers of the host of heaven, and those 'turned back from the LORD.' Idolaters judged. God roots out every rival to His worship.
He will cut off the remnant of Baal, the worshippers of the host of heaven, and those 'turned back from the LORD.' Idolaters judged. God roots out every rival to His worship.
He will cut off the remnant of Baal, the worshippers of the host of heaven, and those 'turned back from the LORD.' Idolaters judged. God roots out every rival to His worship.
'Hold thy peace,' for the day of the LORD is at hand; He has bidden His guests; He will punish princes and those clad in foreign fashion. Solemn hush. The day of reckoning calls for awe, not chatter.
'Hold thy peace,' for the day of the LORD is at hand; He has bidden His guests; He will punish princes and those clad in foreign fashion. Solemn hush. The day of reckoning calls for awe, not chatter.
'Hold thy peace,' for the day of the LORD is at hand; He has bidden His guests; He will punish princes and those clad in foreign fashion. Solemn hush. The day of reckoning calls for awe, not chatter.
A cry shall rise from the gates, and the merchant people be cut down. Commerce silenced. The bustling marts fall quiet under God's hand.
A cry shall rise from the gates, and the merchant people be cut down. Commerce silenced. The bustling marts fall quiet under God's hand.
He will 'search Jerusalem with candles' and punish the complacent who say 'The LORD will not do good nor evil.' Searched out. None can hide from God, least of all the careless.
He will 'search Jerusalem with candles' and punish the complacent who say 'The LORD will not do good nor evil.' Searched out. None can hide from God, least of all the careless.
The great day of the LORD is near, 'a day of wrath... of darkness... a day of the trumpet' against the fenced cities. Dread day. No defence avails when God arises to judge.
The great day of the LORD is near, 'a day of wrath... of darkness... a day of the trumpet' against the fenced cities. Dread day. No defence avails when God arises to judge.
The great day of the LORD is near, 'a day of wrath... of darkness... a day of the trumpet' against the fenced cities. Dread day. No defence avails when God arises to judge.
He will bring such distress that men walk like the blind; 'their silver and their gold shall not be able to deliver them.' Wealth helpless. Riches cannot buy off the wrath of God.
